swissarmyhammer-entity/src/undo_stack.rs

Coverage: 57.6% (34/59 lines)

Uncovered functions:
- with_max_size (2 lines: 69-71)
- undo_target / redo_target (navigation, lines 92-101)

What to test: Create UndoStack, push entries, verify undo_target/redo_target return correct entries. Test push trims when exceeding max_size. Test save to temp file and load back. Test clear empties the stack.
